text.title: Google Ads Reporting and Optimization Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example showing the methodology applied to a realistic scenario, including the produced artefact.

example.description: B2B SaaS account, week 20 of 2026: $4250 spend, 73 conversions, CPA 8% above target. Mobile CPA 60% higher than desktop, $120 wasted on 4 irrelevant Search Terms, brand QS dropped 9 -> 7.
example.note: Three quantified actions with named owners; vanity metrics relegated to the diagnostic appendix.
